chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P. No. D- 477 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 2044/2023 2.For orders on office objections 2.For orders on CMA 2045/2023 3.For orders on CMA 2046/2023 4.For hearing of main case 14-03-2023 Mr. Ghulam Sarwar Halepoto, Advocate along with both petitioners. ****** At the very outset, learned counsel for the petitioners does not press prayer clauses with regard to quashment of FIR No. 19 of 2023, registered at P.S, Behram-Qambar-Shahdadkot. However, he states that since the petitioner No.1 has immediate threats to her life on contracting marriage with the petitioner No.2, he seeks directions to the concerned police officials of district Khairpur to provide legal protection to the petitioners, as and when required by them. Accordingly, this petition stands disposed of along with listed applications directing to the SSP, Khairpur to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law, leaving the petitioners at liberty to approach the concerned Court for quashment of aforementioned FIR. Office is directed to communicate this order to the respondent No.3/SSP, Khairpur for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
